decider.instruction:
<image>
You are a phone-use AI agent. Now your task is "打开淘宝，然后将评价最好的舒适家居拖鞋添加到我的购物车".
Your action history is:
1. {"reasoning": "为了找到舒适家居拖鞋，首先需要在淘宝App的首页找到搜索框，点击它可以输入商品关键词。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于屏幕顶部的搜索框"}}
2. {"reasoning": "已经点击了搜索框，现在需要输入要搜索的商品名称“舒适家居拖鞋”。", "action": "input", "parameters": {"text": "舒适家居拖鞋"}}
3. {"reasoning": "已经输入了要搜索的商品名称，现在点击搜索按钮开始搜索。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "搜索框右侧的“搜索”按钮"}}
4. {"reasoning": "搜索结果已经展示出来，为了找到评价最好的，需要点击右上角的筛选按钮。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于右上角的筛选按钮"}}
5. {"reasoning": "点击筛选后，为了筛选出评价最好的，需要点击店铺评分。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "全部筛选弹窗左侧的“店铺评分”选项"}}
6. {"reasoning": "为了筛选出评价最好的商品，需要选择5分，点击5分选项。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "筛选页面中的“5分”选项"}}
7. {"reasoning": "已经选择了筛选条件，点击底部的确定按钮来确认筛选。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于筛选页面底部的橙色“确定”按钮"}}
8. {"reasoning": "筛选结果已经展示出来，点击第一个商品进入商品详情页。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "商品列表中第一个商品，灰色的拖鞋"}}
9. {"reasoning": "进入了商品详情页，现在需要将这个拖鞋加入购物车，点击位于底部的“加入购物车”按钮。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于屏幕底部的“加入购物车”按钮"}}
Please provide the next action based on the screenshot and your action history. You should do careful reasoning before providing the action.
Your action space includes:
- Name: click, Parameters: target_element (a high-level description of the UI element to click).
- Name: swipe, Parameters: direction (one of UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT).
- Name: input, Parameters: text (the text to input).
- Name: wait, Parameters: (no parameters, will wait for 1 second).
- Name: done, Parameters: (no parameters).
Your output should be a JSON object with the following format:
{"reasoning": "Your reasoning here", "action": "The next action (one of click, input, swipe, wait, done)", "parameters": {"param1": "value1", ...}}
decider.output: {"reasoning": "当前页面未按预期加载，需要用户接管，中止任务执行", "action": "done", "parameters": {}}

decider.instruction:
<image>
You are a phone-use AI agent. Now your task is "在淘宝App中进入珀莱雅的直播间".
Your action history is:
1. {"reasoning": "为了在淘宝App中进入珀莱雅的直播间，首先需要点击淘宝直播的入口，该入口位于屏幕左侧的“淘宝直播”模块。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "首页屏幕下方的“淘宝直播”模块"}}
2. {"reasoning": "进入淘宝直播页面后，为了找到珀莱雅的直播间，需要点击顶部的搜索框来搜索店铺。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "位于屏幕顶部的搜索框"}}
3. {"reasoning": "已经激活了搜索框，现在我需要输入要搜索的店铺名称“珀莱雅”。", "action": "input", "parameters": {"text": "珀莱雅"}}
4. {"reasoning": "我已经输入了“珀莱雅”，现在我需要点击搜索按钮来查看搜索结果。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "搜索框右侧的“搜索”按钮"}}
5. {"reasoning": "搜索结果已经显示出来，我将选择“直播热卖中”的“珀莱雅红宝石水乳套装护肤品补水保湿紧湿”直播间。", "action": "click", "parameters": {"target_element": "“珀莱雅红宝石水乳套装护肤品补水保湿紧湿”直播间"}}
Please provide the next action based on the screenshot and your action history. You should do careful reasoning before providing the action.
Your action space includes:
- Name: click, Parameters: target_element (a high-level description of the UI element to click).
- Name: swipe, Parameters: direction (one of UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT).
- Name: input, Parameters: text (the text to input).
- Name: wait, Parameters: (no parameters, will wait for 1 second).
- Name: done, Parameters: (no parameters).
Your output should be a JSON object with the following format:
{"reasoning": "Your reasoning here", "action": "The next action (one of click, input, swipe, wait, done)", "parameters": {"param1": "value1", ...}}
decider.output: {"reasoning": "当前页面不合预期，需要用户介入，中止任务执行", "action": "done", "parameters": {}}
